title: Create GET /api/vault/audit-notes route with unit test
acceptance_criteria: File app/server/api/vault/audit-notes.get.ts exists and exports a Nitro defineEventHandler as default.
The handler calls readCanonicalVaultReadModel(resolveVaultWorkspaceRoot()) and returns { auditNotes } where auditNotes is ReadModelAuditNote[] sorted by createdAt descending.

An exported interface AuditNoteResponse is defined in the same file with fields: id (string), taskId (string), message (string), source (string), confidence (number), createdAt (string), sourcePath (string).
File app/server/api/vault/audit-notes.get.test.ts exists with at least 2 test cases.
Test case 1: mocked readCanonicalVaultReadModel returns a model with 2 auditNotes — handler returns both sorted by createdAt desc.
Test case 2: mocked readCanonicalVaultReadModel returns empty auditNotes — handler returns { auditNotes: [] }.
bun test server/api/vault/audit-notes.get.test.ts passes with 0 failures.
completion_summary: Added GET /api/vault/audit-notes with a typed response helper, workspace-aware filtering, descending sort order, and route tests for populated and empty results.
